title: VRM Evidence Input
description: Input payload for the Validation Runtime Manager. Assembled by build-vrm-prompt from work item and spec data only — builder narratives, diffs, and implementation explanations are excluded.

candidate_set_id.description: The active candidate set being validated

work_item_ids.description: One or more work items validated together in this candidate set

behavior_spec_revision.description: Highest behavior spec revision represented in the candidate set

acceptance_criteria_refs.description: Paths or anchors into the behavior spec (e.g., docs/product/behavior-spec.md#B3)

files_expected.description: Paths the candidate set is expected to have modified (union of owned_paths)

verification_commands.description: Commands the VRM must execute to validate the candidate

non_goals.description: Explicitly out of scope — VRM should not flag these as missing

forbidden_context.description: Context types that must NOT be included in VRM input (information barrier)
